title: astragalus esferayenicus
intro: Astragalus esferayenicus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch or Astragalus, is a perennial legume native to certain parts of the world. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that support immune function. Astragalus esferayenicus has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
